data.title: Siili Solutions Plc disclosed information under Securities Market Act section 9, #10.
data.description: Several individuals tested positive for COVID-19 in a recent outbreak in a nursing home in New York. In total, 23 residents and 12 staff members were confirmed to have contracted the virus. The facility has implemented strict isolation protocols and is working closely with health officials to prevent further spread. The residents who tested positive are currently receiving medical care, while the staff members are self-isolating at home. The situation is being closely monitored, and all necessary precautions are being taken to ensure the safety of the residents and staff.

data.title: Solmate Infrastructure (NASDAQ: SLMT) stock surges 46% pre-market after updates on data centers, M&A, and financing strategies related to Solana (CRYPTO: SOL).
data.description: Solmate Infrastructure (NASDAQ: SLMT) stock is surging by 46% in pre-market trading on Thursday following significant updates regarding the company's new data centers, mergers and acquisitions, and financing plans. The Solana-based cryptocurrency infrastructure firm has chosen a new data center in the United Arab Emirates to accommodate its bare metal Solana validators, contributing to the rise in SLMT shares. Furthermore, Solmate has initiated an "aggressive" M&A approach to capitalize on opportunities within the Solana ecosystem and enhance SOL-per-share growth. The company has also successfully secured... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Amentum will host Q4 and full FY25 earnings call on Nov 25, 2025 at 8:30 AM EST, discussing results ending Oct 3, 2025. Webcast available.
data.description: A global leader in advanced engineering and technology solutions, Amentum (NYSE: AMTM), will conduct a conference call on November 25, 2025, at 8:30 AM EST to review financial performance for Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 ending on October 3, 2025. Ahead of the call, a news release with the results will be published. The conference call, accessible via webcast through a link on Amentum’s Investor Relations Website, will allow public participation. An event replay will also be available post-call.

data.title: CIS climbs to No. 153 on ENR's 2025 Top 200 Environmental Firms List with 89% revenue growth to $72 million from $38 million in 2023.
data.description: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, CIS, a prominent builder of community-based resilient infrastructure, has made significant progress, moving up to No. 153 on Engineering News-Record's (ENR) 2025 Top 200 Largest Global Environmental Firms. This marks a noteworthy climb of 26 places from their position at No. 179 in 2024. The jump in ranking signifies a period of expansion for CIS, with a remarkable 89% surge in revenue, soaring from $38 million in 2023 to $72 million in 2024. This impressive growth can be attributed to CIS's distinctive approach of forming enduring partnerships to enhance their access to opportunities.

data.title: Saudi Arabia Diabetic Food Market expected to reach USD 492.34 Million by 2030, growing at 4.82% CAGR. Various competitors analyzed in the market.
data.description: A new report titled "Saudi Arabia Diabetic Food Market by Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Diabetic Food in Saudi Arabia reached a value of USD 371.21 Million in 2024 and is estimated to grow to USD 492.34 Million by 2030, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.82%. This growth is attributed to the rising incidence of diabetes in both elderly and younger individuals.

data.title: Beyond Meat shares dropped 19% to $2.90 due to Short Squeeze Rally surge of 127% on Monday and 146.26% on Tuesday after joining Roundhill Meme Stock ETF, with $1.2 billion debt against $360 million revenue.
data.description: Shares of Beyond Meat Inc. (NASDAQ: BYND) experienced a significant drop of 19% to $2.90 in pre-market trading on Thursday. The stock had previously seen a remarkable Short Squeeze Rally, with a surge of 127% on Monday and a further 146.26% on Tuesday after being added to the Roundhill Meme Stock ETF (NYSE: MEME). This positive trend was attributed to the stock's inclusion in the ETF, a new distribution partnership with Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT), and a debt restructuring. Beyond Meat currently holds about $1.2 billion in long-term debt, in contrast to its $360 million in trailing 12-month revenue. The stock reached a peak of $7.69 mid-morning on Wednesday before experiencing a pullback. Martin Shkreli, the ex-pharmaceutical executive and hedge fund manager, made pertinent comments regarding a short position in the company. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: San Antonio opens Ball 2 Barrel Baseball Academy, offering elite training for all ages. State-of-the-art facility aims to develop baseball talent.
data.description: The latest top-tier baseball training facility in San Antonio, Ball 2 Barrel Baseball Academy, has recently opened to groom the future baseball stars. This advanced academy offers various training programs to enhance players' skills, covering all aspects from basics to advanced techniques. With cutting-edge facilities and expert coaching staff, the academy aims to nurture the baseball talent of tomorrow.

data.title: Employees are enthusiastic about agentic AI (84%), but worry about job security (56%) due to lack of communication and training gaps.
data.description: According to recent data, 84% of workers are enthusiastic about incorporating agentic AI into their jobs. However, 56% express concerns about job security when working alongside AI agents. This discrepancy underscores a pressing issue within the workforce. The report was based on a survey conducted in New York on October 23, 2025.

data.title: Greentown Labs partners with Amazon for 'Go Build 2026' program seeking startups with CO₂-mineralization tech for concrete-aggregate; Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: Greentown Labs, a prestigious climatetech and energy incubator based in Somerville, Mass. and Houston, has recently launched an open-innovation program seeking applications from top startups specializing in CO₂-mineralization technologies for producing concrete aggregates. As of October 23, 2025, this initiative aims to foster innovative solutions to combat climate change. Greentown Labs boasts the title of being the largest incubator of its kind globally, offering a prime opportunity for startups to showcase their capabilities. This announcement serves as a significant opportunity for startups in the field, emphasizing the importance of leveraging CO₂-mineralization technologies to revolutionize concrete-aggregate production.

data.title: NYSE provides daily pre-market update on Oct 23rd; Ashley Mastronardi delivers insights before trading starts.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can gain valuable market insights before the trading day commences by accessing the latest NYSE Pre-market update. The update for October 23 was presented by Ashley Mastronardi.

data.title: Shawn Gentle joins LPL Financial with $280 million in assets from Raymond James.
data.description: Today, LPL Financial LLC revealed that Shawn Gentle, AIF® from Gentle Family Wealth Partners, has recently become a part of LPL Financial’s broker-dealer and Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) platform. Gentle brings with him around $280 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement plan assets*. He made the move from Raymond James to join LPL.

data.title: SciSparc aims to revolutionize AI drug discovery through quantum-powered 3D protein modeling, targeting breakthroughs in structural biology.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on October 23, 2025, SciSparc Ltd. (Nasdaq: SPRC) revealed plans for an inventive project in the realm of pharmaceuticals. Specializing in central nervous system disorder treatments, the Company disclosed that on September 16, 2025, its directors decided to launch a groundbreaking Initiative. This initiative will leverage quantum computing technology to enhance 3D protein modeling. The primary objective of this program is to revolutionize drug discovery processes by substantially improving the precision in projecting protein structures and their interactions with ligands. This advancement could potentially lead to significant developments in structural biology and personalized medicine.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield to hold Investor Day on Dec 4, 2025 in NYC, with CEO and CFO presenting growth strategy.
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield, listed on the NYSE as CWK, is set to hold an Investor Day in New York City on Thursday, December 4, 2025. The event will feature CEO Michelle MacKay, CFO Neil Johnston, and key members of the global management team discussing the company's growth strategy and financial outlook. Scheduled to commence at 8:30 a.m. ET, the Investor Day is expected to wrap up around 12 p.m. ET. Further information and a live webcast of the event will be accessible through Cushman & Wakefield's channels.

data.title: BizEquity releases 2025 Almanac providing comprehensive U.S. private business valuations data. #PHILADELPHIA #PRNewswire
data.description: Philadelphia based company, BizEquity, revealed their Annual BizEquity Almanac 2025, an information-packed resource on U.S. private companies. The almanac provides valuable insights and statistics for financial professionals. Released on October 23, 2025, it is designed to offer a comprehensive overview of the current state of private businesses in the country. BizEquity is known for offering tools and knowledge for business valuation, catering to the needs of financial experts. This almanac is a significant tool for those in the industry seeking up-to-date data on the market.

data.title: M-tron Industries to present at ThinkEquity Conf on Oct 30, 2025. (NYSE: MPTI) specializes in electronic components.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, M-tron Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: MPTI) revealed its latest updates. The company, known for its advanced electronic components in aerospace, defense, avionics, and space sectors, shared exciting news.

data.title: Eagle Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2025 results and cash dividend; CORRECTION: conference call links were outdated.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, a press release was issued by Eagle Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: EGBN) in Bethesda, Maryland. The release highlighted that the links to the conference call provided in the previous release on October 22 were outdated. This correction was made to ensure accurate information dissemination to stakeholders.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific beats Q3 expectations with earnings of $5.79/share and sales of $11.122 billion. Analysts increase forecasts.
data.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc (NYSE: TMO) exceeded expectations in their third quarter earnings report. They reported earnings of $5.79 per share, surpassing the analyst estimate of $5.49 per share. Additionally, the company's quarterly sales reached $11.122 billion, higher than the expected $10.908 billion. Marc N. Casper, chairman of the company, attributed this success to the team's exceptional performance, driven by their growth strategy, the PPI Business System, and active company management.

data.title: Standex Corp (NYSE: SXI) declares 245th consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share, 6.3% YoY increase. Payable on Nov 21.
data.description: In Salem, New Hampshire, on October 23, 2025, Standex International Corporation (NYSE: SXI) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share, marking a growth of around 6.3% compared to the previous year. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on November 21, 2025.
